series_metadata.series_description: These files contain correspondence between the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions and the bank holding companies regarding affiliates of state-chartered banks and/or resulting from interstate bank acquisitions as provided in Ohio Revised Code Section 1101.05, including all material related to this correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility three (3) years ; Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Electronic: electronic files three (3) years
retention_rules.disposition_method: Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
